channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: At beginning of tough stretch, Lakers show grit with overtime victory over Knicks
item.description: It is fitting that in a town built on movies and television, JJ Redick likes to use a popular directing term to refer to different moments in his first season as coach of the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: Joe Reedy, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agrees to $65.5 million, 7-year deal with A's, AP source says
item.description: Outfielder Lawrence Butler agreed to a $65.5 million, seven-year contract with the Athletics, a person with direct knowledge of the negotiations said Thursday night, the latest big-money deal for a team suddenly spending as it prepares to play three seasons in a minor league ballpark.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Cyrus Shafie’s frozen-rope OT strike from outside the box carries Mountain View to NorCal Division II title game
item.description: In a tight game against Clayton Valley that required extra time to settle, the Mountain View junior midfielder made his mark with a stunning shot from long distance
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: US offers $10 million reward for fugitive snowboarder accused of running deadly drug ring
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — There's a $10 million reward for information leading to the arrest of a former Olympic snowboarder for Canada who is wanted for running a multi-national drug trafficking network and orchestrating multiple murders related to the drug ring.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: One-of-a-kind card featuring jersey patch of Pirates star Paul Skenes is heading to auction
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has been in the major leagues for less than a year. A piece of the Pittsburgh Pirates ace — well, OK, a piece of the jersey that Skenes donned during his first start last May — could be ready to join some elite company.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boys Volleyball: Cathedral Catholic 3, Granite Hills 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys Volleyball action on Wednesday night Cathedral Catholic beat Granite Hills in three sets.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Hakeem Jeffries again claims banning trans athletes from girls sports will unleash sexual predators on girls
item.description: Hakeem Jeffries repeated an unsubstantiated claim that the Defending Women and Girls in Sports Act would have "unleashed" sexual predators on girls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At the bobsled and skeleton world championships, some moms might make their way to the podium
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The latest addition to the list of amenities available to athletes at the bobsled and skeleton world championships is a room inside a lodge just down the hill from the finish line.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Browns restructure Watson's contract to get under the salary cap, AP source says
item.description: Deshaun Watson's contract has been reworked again by the Cleveland Browns as the team looks to clear salary cap space with the new league year less than one week away.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: John Cena's shocking WWE heel turn 'bigger than wrestling angle,' Hulk Hogan says
item.description: Hulk Hogan weighed in on Wednesday about John Cena turning heel in a shocking twist of events during the WWE Elimination Chamber premium live event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump admin declares Maine violated Title IX by letting trans athletes play in girls' sports
item.description: The Department of Health and Human Services served a notice of Title IX violation to Maine after it defied Trump's executive order to protect girls' sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU wins double-overtime thriller over #10 Iowa State
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 23 points and No. 23 BYU outlasted No. 10 Iowa State 88-85 in double overtime Tuesday night for its seventh consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Pitt football player, HSE grad dies in Fishers crash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — An 18-year-old football player died in a crash in Fishers late Saturday night. According to a press release sent by the Hamilton County Sheriff's Office Sunday morning, the crash happened around 9:03 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, NewsNation

item.title: Bulls guard, Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu to have shoulder surgery, out for season, team announces
item.description: CHICAGO — The 2024-25 season is over for Bulls guard and Chicago native Ayo Dosunmu. The team announced Sunday morning the fourth-year player and former University of Illinois star will undergo left shoulder surgery and will miss the rest of the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: John Collins leads Jazz to 117-116 win over Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Walker Kessler had a go-ahead dunk with 9.7 seconds left to help the Utah Jazz beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 117-116 on Friday night, snapping a six-game losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gavin Lowe scores 35 as Olympus rolls to 5A title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The first two times Olympus and Highland met this season, both games were decided by a total of four points. But in Friday's 5A championship, it wasn't close at all.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
